claim: A separate stock pattern recognition engine can analyze a ticker, pull live market/news/filing context, connect it to local memory, and save the result as a normal Investing ledger entry.
changes: Created stock_pattern_engine.py as a standalone engine.
Added SEC companyfacts extraction for latest reported quarter and latest annual financials.
Added Yahoo chart quote adapter and Yahoo Finance RSS headline adapter.
Added local SQLite memory context search for company and ticker matches.
Added Stock Intel tab with Analyze Stock and Save To Memory controls.
Added conversion from stock analysis output to a standard Info Analyzer Investing entry.

verification.command: scan web/app.js $() references against web/index.html ids

verification.result: returned quote, SEC financials, news, local memory, signals, and decision frame with no source errors
temporary stock entry saved, then deleted successfully

next_risk: Foreign stocks like SK Hynix need a provider path for financials beyond SEC companyfacts; first version can support quote/news and local memory, but not full foreign statements.
